name: G Pen Dash 2
summary: A compact, affordable conduction dry-herb vaporiser with temperature control and a built-in tool, for patients who want a simple pocket device.
description: The G Pen Dash 2 from Grenco Science is a small, pocketable dry-herb vaporiser that keeps things straightforward. A ceramic chamber and precise temperature control on a clear LED display give you more dosing flexibility than its size suggests, with an integrated cooling airflow path for smoother draws and a generous 0.4g oven. A built-in pick tool handles loading and cleaning, and the 1,100mAh battery charges over USB-C with pass-through. For a UK patient who wants a low-cost, easy everyday vaporiser that fits in a pocket, the Dash 2 is a sensible starter — note the USB-C cable isn't included.
